## getRootXComponent() function

Given a component, finds the root XComponent in the ancestors hierarchy.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function getRootXComponent(component: Vue): Vue | undefined;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  component | Vue | The component to find its root XComponent. |

<b>Returns:</b>

Vue \| undefined

The root XComponent or undefined if it has not.
